verses.text: Tua ciangin mihon khempeuh nakpi takin kiko uh a, tua zan sung kap uh hi
Israel mite khempeuh in Moses leh Aaron phunsan uh a, mihon buppi in amaute tungah, “Egypt gamah a si khin hizaw hoh le-ung! Tua ahih kei leh zong hih gamlakah a si khin hizaw hoh le-ung

Namsau tawh a si dingin bang hangin Topa in hih gamah kote hong paipih ahi hiam? Ka zite uh leh ka tate uh galte' mat suak ding uh hi. Egypt-ah ciahkik ding ko-a' dingin hoihzaw ding hilo ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Amaute khatlekhat kiangah, “Makai khat teelin Egypt-ah ciahkik ni,” kici uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel mihon kikhawmte khempeuh' mai-ah Moses leh Aaron boksuk uh hi
Gam vaante' lakah a kihel Nun' tapa Joshua leh Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb-te in a puan uh balkekin
Israel mihonte khempeuh tungah, “A vaan dingin kote ka va painasa uh leitang a hoih mahmah ahi hi
Eite' tungah Topa a lungkim leh, bawngnawi leh khuaizu tui bangin a luan'na hih leitangah eite hong paipihin eite tungah tua leitang hong pia ding hi

Topa phunsan kei hamtang un. Amaute pen zialmang pak ding ihih manin tua gam mite kihta kei un. Amau' kiang panin amau' kidalna kilakhia khin a, eite tawh Topa hong om hi; amaute kihta kei un,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin mihonte khempeuh in, amaute suang tawh deng un, a ci uh hi. Tua ciangin Israel mi khempeuh' muhin kikhopna buk tungah Topa' minthan'na vang hong kilang hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Hih mite in bang tanvei kei hong simmawh ding ahi uh hiam? Amaute' lakah ka hihsa limte om napi-in, amaute in bang tanvei hong umlo lailai ding ahi uh hiam
Pulnatna tawh amaute vatgawpin ka lawnkhia kik ding a, amaute sangin a lianzaw a thahat zaw minamin nang kong bawl ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Moses in Topa' kiangah, “Tua bang hi leh Egypt mite in hih thu za ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute' lak panin na thahatna tawh hih mite na paikhiatpih hi

Amaute in hih gama teng mite tungah gen ding uh hi. Topa aw, hih mite' lakah nang na omna thu hih mite in za khinzo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, maitang kituahin nang hong kimu a, amaute' tungah nangma meii a ding hi. Amaute' mai-ah sunin meii khuam sungah, zanin mei khuam sungah nang na pai hi
Tu-in hih mite mihing khat thah bangin that lecin, nangma minthang vangliatna a zasa minamte in
‘Amaute' tungah piak dinga a kiciam leitangah Topa in hih mite paipih zolo ahih manin, amah in gamlakah amaute that hi,’ ci ding uh hi

Tu-in, nang tungah hong thum ing. Nangmah in thu ciamin, ‘ Topa heh hak a, a itna kip lianin, mawhna leh thu palsatna maisak a, ahih hangin a mawhte siangsak ngeiloin, pate' mawhna tate tungah, khang thum khang lina dongin thuk hi,’ na cih mah bangin Topa' vangliatna liansak in
A lian nangma itna kip tawh a kizui leh Egypt panin tuhun dong hih mite na maisaksa tawh kizui-in hih mite' mawhna maisak in, kong thum hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Nangma gen bangin ka maisak hi
Ahih hangin a taktakin, ka nuntak laiteng, Topa' minthan'na tawh leitung kidim ding ahih mah bangin
Egypt leh gamlakah ka hihsa ka vangliatna leh ka limte mu khin napi-in sawmvei kei hong ze-etin keima aw a ngailo mite
amau' pate tungah piak dinga ka kiciam leitang a mu kuamah omlo ding uh hi. Kei hong simmawh mi kuamah in tua leitang mulo ding hi
Ahih hangin ka nasem Kaleb ahih leh, amah in lungsim tuam nei-in limtakin kei hong zui ahih manin, amah in a zuat leitangah ka tun'pih ding a, ama suanlekhakte in tua leitang luah ding uh hi
Tu-in tua kuam sungah Amalek mite leh Kanaan mite teng uh ahih manin, San Tuipi paina lampi tawnin zing ciangin gamlakah pai un,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
“Hih a gilo mihonte in bang tanvei kei hong phunsan ding uh ahi hiam? Israel mite in kei hong phunsanna ka za khin hi
Amaute tungah hih bangin gen in: Topa in, ‘Kei a nungta ka hih mah bangin ka zakna-ah na gente uh no tungah ka hong hih ding hi
Na luanghawmte uh hih gamlakah lum ding hi. Note khempeuh, kum sawmnih pan a tungsiah, kei hong phunsante
Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb leh Nun' tapa Joshua simloh, note tengsak dingin ka kiciamna leitangah khat beek na tung kei ding uh hi
Ahih hangin galte in man ding na cih uh na tate uh, keimah in ka tumpih ding a, note in na thusim loh uh leitang amaute in mu ding uh hi
Ahih hangin note ahih leh, na luanghawmte uh hih gamlakah lum ding hi
Na luanghawmte uh a nunung pen gamlakah a kisial mateng, gamlakah kum sawmli sung na tate uh tuucing hi ding uh a, note' ginatlohna thuak ding uh hi
Na gam vaan sung uh ni phazah tawh kizui-in, ni sawmli, ni khat ciangin kum khat, note in na mawhna uh kum sawmli sung na thuak ding uh a, keima lungkimlohna na thei ding uh hi,’ ci hi

Topa ahi keimah in thu ka gen hi. Keimah langpangin a kikaikhawm hih a gilo mihonte khempeuh tungah hih thu ka hih taktak ding hi. Hih gamlakah amaute beimang ding uh a, amaute si ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Moses in gam vaan dingin a sawl mite hong ciahkikin a gam thu a sialamin gen uh ahih manin mihonte Topa a phunsansak
a gam thu a sialamin a gen tua mite, Topa' mai-ah gimna in sisak hi
Ahih hangin gam vaan dingin a pai mite lak panin Nun' tapa Joshua leh Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb-te hing lai uh hi.
Moses in Israel mite khempeuh tungah hih thute gen a, nakpi takin mite thum uh hi
Amaute zingsangin tho baih uh a, gamlak mual dawnah paito-in, “Thei un, hih lai-ah i om hi. Topa' ciamnasa munah i paito ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh i khial khin hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Moses in, “Bang hangin tu-in Topa' thupiakna palsat na hi uh hiam, tangtunglo ding hilo ahi hiam
Na galte uh mai-ah note hong kisatpuk kha ding ahih manin kuanto kei un. Bang hang hiam cih leh note' lakah Topa omlo hi
Amalek mite leh Kanaan mite na mai uhah om ahih ciangin namsau tawh note na puk ding uh hi. Topa zuihna panin nungkik na hih uh ciangin note tawh Topa hong omlo ding hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Topa' thuciamna singkuang hita leh Moses hita leh giahphual panin dingkhialo napi-in gamlak mual dawnah kuantoh ding amaute in ngaihsun veve uh hi
Tua ciangin mualtung gamah a teng Amalek mite leh Kanaan mite hong paisuk uh a, amaute zo-in Hormah ciangdong nangawnah amaute a delh uh hi.
